description:
Located in the center of Alpbach, Hotel Zur Post features a Tyrolean restaurant, cozy rooms and an outdoor pool (in summer, not heated!) as well as a sauna and a steambath. Free private parking is available on site.

All rooms at Hotel Zur Post overlook the mountains and offer satellite TV and a bathroom with hairdryer.

The restaurant at Zur Post Hotel serves Tyrolean and Austrian specialities, as well as international cuisine. There is also a bar.

Spa facilities include an outdoor sauna, a eucalyptus steam bath, and an infrared cabin. Guests can use a heated ski storage room and relax on the sun terrace.

The free ski bus stops right next to Hotel Zur Post. Ski schools, a ski rental, and many shops and restaurants are only steps away.

The Alpbachtal Card is included in the price. This card comprises many free benefits such as free use the public buses. In summer, cable cars can also be used free of charge.

Beachfront Location:Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde in Yspertal offers direct beachfront access, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests can relax by the lake or enjoy stunning mountain views.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature balconies with lake or garden views, private bathrooms, and modern amenities such as free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and work desks. Family rooms and interconnected rooms cater to all travellers.Dining and Leisure:The on-site restaurant serves breakfast with fresh pastries, cheese, fruits, and juice. Additional facilities include a bar, coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and fitness room. Free private parking is available.Local Attractions:Melk Abbey is 42 km away, Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum 21 km, Dürnstein Castle 47 km, and Maria Taferl Basilica 21 km from the hotel. Linz Airport is 98 km distant.

The Alpbachtal Card is included in the price. This card comprises many free benefits such as free use the public buses. In summer, cable cars can also be used free of charge.

Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde está en Yspertal, a 42 km de Abadía Melk, y dispone de alojamiento con jardín, parking privado gratis, salón de uso común y terraza. Todas las opciones de alojamiento de este hotel de 3 estrellas tienen vistas a la montaña, restaurante y bar. El alojamiento ofrece servicio de habitaciones, cajero automático y servicio de organización de tours.

En el hotel, las habitaciones cuentan con escritorio, un balcón con vistas a la ciudad, baño privado, TV de pantalla plana, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las habitaciones tienen armario.

La zona es ideal para practicar ciclismo, y en Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde hay alquiler de bicicletas.

Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum está a 21 km del alojamiento, y Dürnstein Castle está a 47 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Linz) está a 98 km.

Die Unterkunft Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde, die in Yspertal, 42 km von Stift Melk entfernt gelegen ist, verfügt über Übernachtungsmöglichkeiten mit einem Garten, einem kostenlosen Privatparkplatz, einer Gemeinschaftslounge und einer Terrasse. Dieses Hotel mit 3 Sternen bietet durchweg Bergblick und die Gäste haben Zugang zu einem Restaurant und einer Bar. Die Unterkunft bietet einen Zimmerservice, einen Geldautomaten und eine Organisation von Touren für Gäste.

In der Unterkunft Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde sind die Zimmer ergänzt mit einem Schreibtisch, einem Flachbild-TV, einem eigenen Badezimmer, Bettwäsche, Handtüchern und einem Balkon mit Stadtblick. Alle Gästezimmer haben einen Kleiderschrank.

Die Gegend ist beliebt zum Fahrradfahren. Ein Fahrradverleih ist in der Unterkunft Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde verfügbar.

Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum liegt 21 km von der Unterkunft Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde entfernt, während Burgruine Dürnstein 47 km von der Unterkunft entfernt ist. Der nächstgelegene Flughafen ist der Flughafen Linz, 98 km von der Unterkunft Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde entfernt.

Ubicato a Yspertal, a 42 km da Abbazia di Melk, Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde propone un giardino, un parcheggio privato gratuito, una sala comune e una terrazza. In questo hotel a 3 stelle ogni alloggio ha una vista sulla montagna e gli ospiti possono fruire di un ristorante e un bar. La struttura mette a disposizione servizio in camera, bancomat e organizzazione di tour per gli ospiti.

Presso questo hotel, le camere includono una scrivania, un balcone con vista città, un bagno privato, una TV a schermo piatto, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Tutte le camere hanno un armadio.

La zona è famosa per il ciclismo, mentre presso Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde è disponibile un servizio di noleggio biciclette.

Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum è a 21 km da questa struttura, mentre Dürnstein Castle si trova a 47 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Linz si trova a 98 km di distanza.

Comfortable Accommodations:COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein in Gosau offers family rooms with balconies and private bathrooms. Each room includes a hypoallergenic bed, free toiletries, and modern amenities.Exceptional Facilities:Guests enjoy spa facilities, a sauna, fitness centre, sun terrace, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a lounge, indoor play area, and electric vehicle charging station.Dining Experience:The modern, family-friendly restaurant serves Austrian, international, and European cuisines with vegetarian and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes local specialities, fresh pastries, and mountain views.Activities and Location:Situated 68 km from Salzburg W. A. Mozart Airport, the hotel offers skiing and cycling. Guests appreciate the scenic location with stunning mountain views.

Dieses familienfreundliche 4-Sterne-Superior-Wellnesshotel auf 1.500 m über dem Meeresspiegel mit direktem Zugang zu den Pisten des Skigebiets Nauders am Reschenpass bietet einen 4.000 m² großen Spabereich mit einem separaten Familienbereich, Pools, einem Fitnessraum und verschiedenen Saunen. Das À-la-carte-Restaurant mit Terrasse und beeindruckendem Bergblick serviert österreichische und internationale Küche sowie Pizza.

Im Hotel Mein Almhof können Sie jeden Morgen mit einem Frühstücksbuffet in den Tag starten. Die Bar verfügt über einen Raucherraum. WLAN nutzen Sie im gesamten Hotel kostenfrei.

Der Wellnessbereich des Hotels Mein Almhof verfügt über einen Familien-Textil-Spabereich mit Innenpool und einen separaten Spabereich für Erwachsene. Sie können sich auch eine Massage oder verschiedene Schönheitsanwendungen gönnen, die mehrfach vom Relax Guide ausgezeichnet wurden. Über den Dächern von Nauders befinden sich ein 2.500 m² großer Indoor-Spabereich sowie ein 2.000 m² großer Außenbereich mit Außenblocksauna, Whirlpool und einem 17 Meter langen Skypool.

Mountainbikes können gegen Gebühr ausgeliehen werden und die Via Claudia befindet sich direkt vor der Tür.

Während der Wintersaison steht ein kostenloser Shuttleservice zum Skigebiet Reschenpass zur Verfügung. Ein Skishuttle zur 7 km entfernten Seilbahn Schöneben-Haideralm-Kastl ist ebenfalls vorhanden. Das Hotel Mein Almhof verfügt über ein Skidepot mit Skischuhtrockner, einen Skiverleih sowie eine Skischule. Es gibt kostenfreie Privatparkplätze und gegen Aufpreis kann ein Stellplatz in der Tiefgarage reserviert werden.

Situé à Gosau, l’établissement COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein comprend une salle de sport, un salon commun, une terrasse et un restaurant. De nombreuses installations sont proposées sur place, notamment un bar et un point de vente de forfaits de ski. Cet hôtel pour les personnes souffrant d'allergies possède une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux et un sauna.

Les hébergements disposent d’une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du satellite. Vous bénéficierez d'une salle de bains privative comportant une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Certains hébergements comprennent également une cuisine équipée d’un réfrigérateur. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

Un petit-déjeuner buffet est servi sur place.

L’établissement COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein assure des services de location d’équipement de ski et de location de vélos. La région est prisée des amateurs de ski et de vélo.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart de Salzbourg) est à 68 km.

Comfortable Accommodations:Almwelt Austria in Schladming offers family rooms with private bathrooms, garden or mountain views, and modern amenities including free WiFi, flat-screen TVs, and parquet floors.Wellness and Leisure:Guests can relax in the spa and wellness centre, sauna, hot tub, or steam room. The hotel features a sun terrace, garden, and outdoor seating areas, ideal for leisure activities.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant serves Italian, Austrian, and German cuisines with vegetarian, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes champagne, local specialities, and fresh pastries.Location and Activities:Located 20 km from Dachstein Skywalk and 90 km from Salzburg Airport, Almwelt Austria offers ski-to-door access, ski pass sales, and activities such as fishing, skiing, hiking, and cycling.

Situato nel cuore della Valle di Alpbach, l'Alpbacherhof dispone di navetta gratuita a 100 metri, che collega ai vicini impianti di risalita, vista sulle montagne e area benessere di 1.600 m² con piscina coperta.

Presso il Alpbacherhof - Mountain & Spa Resort potrete usufruire di un ristorante, che propone un’ampia gamma di piatti e vini raffinati, e di un bar che serve cocktail e grappa. Il trattamento di mezza pensione include un drink di benvenuto, la colazione a buffet, uno spuntino per il pranzo o il pomeriggio con torta e zuppa, e 3 opzioni a scelta per la cena.

Ubicato a pochi passi da una pista da sci per principianti, l’hotel offre il servizio massaggi e il noleggio di biciclette tradizionali o elettriche a pagamento, una sessione di yoga una volta a settimana e un programma di intrattenimento settimanale, che include tour a piedi guidati, passeggiate e, d’inverno, escursioni con le racchette da neve. In estate avrete, inoltre, l’opportunità di fare gite con biciclette elettrice accompagnati dalla guida dell'hotel, dedicata esclusivamente agli ospiti del resort.

La struttura sorge nelle vicinanze di luoghi in cui potrete praticare una vasta gamma di attività sportive e ricreative in tutte le stagioni, e a 10 km dalla storica città di Rattenberg.

La tariffa della sistemazione include l’Alpbachtal Card, che vi permetterà di beneficiare gratuitamente di numerosi vantaggi nella regione, tra cui l’ingresso a tutti i laghi balneabili e l’utilizzo di autobus e funivie nella zona circostante.

Situé dans le centre de Mondsee, l'Hotel Krone propose un parking gratuit et des chambres dotées d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. La rive du lac Mondsee est à seulement quelques pas.

Le restaurant sert une cuisine régionale et internationale ainsi que des spécialités de poissons.

L'Hotel Krone met gratuitement à votre disposition un sauna et une cabine infrarouge.

L'autoroute A1 se trouve à seulement quelques minutes en voiture. Salzbourg est accessible en quelques minutes. Les autres lacs de la région du Salzkammergut sont également très proches.

L’établissement Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde vous accueille à Yspertal, à 42 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Abbaye de Melk. Il comprend un jardin, un salon commun, une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit. Tous les hébergements de cet hôtel 3 étoiles offrent une vue sur la montagne. Vous pourrez profiter d'un restaurant et d'un bar. Vous pourrez profiter d'un service d'étage, d'un distributeur de billets et d'un service d’excursions.

Les hébergements possèdent un bureau, un balcon offrant une vue sur la ville, une salle de bains privative, une télévision à écran plat, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous profiterez aussi d’une armoire.

La région est prisée des amateurs de vélo et l’établissement Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde assure un service de location de vélos.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 21 km et 47 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum et Dürnstein Castle. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Linz) est à 98 km.

Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde encontra-se em Yspertal, a 42 km de Mosteiro de Melk, e apresenta acomodações com um jardim, estacionamento privado gratuito, um salão partilhado e um terraço. Todas as acomodações neste hotel de 3 estrelas têm vistas da montanha, um restaurante e um bar. O alojamento dispõe de serviço de quartos, um multibanco e organização de passeios.

No alojamento, os quartos incluem secretária, varanda com vista da cidade, casa de banho privativa, televisão de ecrã plano, roupa de cama e toalhas. Todos os quartos têm roupeiro.

A área é popular para ciclismo, e há aluguer de bicicletas disponível em Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde.

Erzherzog Franz Ferdinand Museum fica a 21 km de Gasthof-Hotel zur Linde, enquanto Dürnstein Castle está a 47 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Linz fica a 98 km de distância.

Located at 1,500 metres above sea level and offering ski-to-door access to the Nauders - Reschenpass Ski Area, this family-friendly 4-star superior wellness hotel features a 4,000 m² large spa area with a separate family area, pools, a gym and various saunas. The à la carte restaurant with a terrace offering impressive mountain views serves Austrian and international cuisine, as well as pizza.

Guests of the Hotel Mein Almhof can start their day with a buffet breakfast every morning. The bar features a smoking lounge. Free Wi-Fi access is available in the entire hotel.

The spa area of the Mein Almhof Hotel has a separate family textile spa area with an indoor pool and a separate adult spa area. Guests can also benefit from a massage or various beauty treatments, award multiple times by the Relax Guide. There is a 2.500 m² large indoor spa area as well as a 2.000 m² large outdoor area featuring an outdoor block sauna, a hot tub and a 17 metres long sky pool above the rooftops of Nauders.

Mountain bikes can be rented for a fee and the Via Claudia Road can be accessed right outside.

During winter season, a free shuttle service to the Reschenpass Ski Area is available. A ski shuttle to the Schöneben-Haideralm-Kastl Cable Car, 7 km away, is also provided. Hotel Mein Almhof has a ski depot with a ski boot dryer, ski rental as well as a ski school. Free private parking is available, while underground parking can be reserved at an additional fee.

COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein presenta un centro fitness, una sala comune, una terrazza e un ristorante a Gosau. I vari servizi di questa struttura includono un bar e un punto vendita di skipass. Provvisto di WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura, questo hotel senza allergeni offre una sauna.

Le camere presso questo hotel dispongono di una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari. Tutte le camere prevedono un bagno privato completo di doccia e set di cortesia, mentre alcune camere comprendono una cucina con un frigorifero. Presso COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein, ogni camera ha lenzuola e asciugamani.

Presso questa struttura potrete gustare una colazione a buffet.

Presso COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein, sono disponibili dei servizi di noleggio dell’attrezzatura sciistica e noleggio biciclette, mentre la zona è famosa per lo sci e il ciclismo.

Aeroporto di Salisburgo - W. A. Mozart si trova a 68 km di distanza.

El Alpbacherhof goza de una ubicación tranquila en pleno valle de Alpbach y ofrece vistas panorámicas a las montañas de los alrededores, una zona de spa de 1.100 m² con piscina cubierta, y servicio de traslado gratuito a los remontes cercanos.

El restaurante del hotel Alpbacherhof - Mountain & Spa Resort sirve una gran selección de platos de alta cocina y vinos refinados. Podrá terminar la noche en el bar con un cóctel o una copa de aguardiente. El régimen de media pensión incluye una bebida de bienvenida, desayunos buffet, merienda con tarta y sopa, y 2 opciones de cena, a elegir.

El hotel está a poca distancia a pie de una pendiente de prácticas para principiantes y facilita sesiones de masajes y servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.

En los alrededores del hotel encontrará una gran selección de instalaciones deportivas y de ocio durante todo el año. La histórica localidad de Rattenberg está a solo 10 km del hotel.

Todos los huéspedes reciben la tarjeta gratuita Alpbachtal-Seenland, con muchas ventajas gratuitas en la región, como acceso gratuito a todos los lagos aptos para el baño y el uso gratuito de autobuses y teleféricos de los alrededores.

COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein dispone de centro de fitness, salón de uso común, terraza y restaurante en Gosau. Este alojamiento ofrece bar y un punto de venta de forfaits. El alojamiento ofrece sauna, wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento y habitaciones familiares.

Las habitaciones de este alojamiento están equipadas con TV de pantalla plana con canales vía satélite. Cada habitación incluye baño privado con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos, y algunas también ofrecen cocina con nevera. En el hotel, cada habitación tiene ropa de cama y toallas.

En COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet.

Hay alquiler de equipamiento de esquí y alquiler de bicicletas en el alojamiento, y la zona es ideal para practicar esquí y ciclismo.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Salzburgo - W. A. Mozart) está a 68 km.

Die Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein bietet ein Fitnesscenter, eine Gemeinschaftslounge, eine Terrasse und ein Restaurant in Gosau. Zu den verschiedenen Einrichtungen dieser Unterkunft gehören eine Bar und eine Skipass-Verkaufsstelle. Dieses Hotel verfügt über eine Sauna und einen Tourenschalter.

Die Gästezimmer in der Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein sind ausgestattet mit einem Flachbild-TV mit Satellitenkanälen. Neben einem eigenen Badezimmer ausgestattet mit einer Dusche und kostenlosen Pflegeprodukten bieten die Zimmer in der Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein außerdem kostenloses WLAN – ausgewählte Zimmer sind bereichert mit Bergblick. In der Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein sind alle Zimmer versehen mit Bettwäsche und Handtüchern.

Ein als Buffet angebotenes Frühstück wird in der Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein angeboten.

Die Gegend ist beliebt zum Skifahren und Fahrradfahren. Darüber hinaus sind an diesem Hotel ein Verleih von Skiausrüstung und ein Fahrradverleih verfügbar.

Der nächstgelegene Flughafen ist der Flughafen Salzburg, 68 km von der Unterkunft COOEE alpin Hotel Dachstein entfernt.

Situé à 1 500 mètres d’altitude et offrant un accès skis aux pieds au domaine skiable Nauders - Reschenpass, cet hôtel de bien-être supérieur 4 étoiles pour toute la famille propose un vaste espace spa de 4 000 m2 avec un espace familial séparé, des piscines, une salle de sport et divers saunas. Le restaurant à la carte avec une terrasse offrant une vue impressionnante sur la montagne sert une cuisine autrichienne et internationale, ainsi que des pizzas.

L’hôtel Mein Almhof sert tous les matins un petit-déjeuner buffet. Le bar dispose d’un salon fumeur. La connexion Wi-Fi est gratuite dans tout l’hôtel.

La zone spa de l’hôtel Mein Almhof dispose d’un espace spa familial séparé pour les textiles avec une piscine intérieure et un espace spa séparé pour les adultes. Vous pouvez également bénéficier d’un massage ou de divers soins de beauté, récompensés à plusieurs reprises par le Guide Relax. Il y a un grand espace spa intérieur de 2 500 m2 ainsi qu’un grand espace extérieur de 2 000 m2 comprenant un sauna en bloc extérieur, un bain à remous et une piscine en altitude de 17 mètres de long au-dessus des toits de Nauders.

Des VTT peuvent être loués moyennant un supplément et la Via Claudia Road est accessible juste à l’extérieur.

Pendant la saison hivernale, un service de navette gratuit vers le domaine skiable Reschenpass est disponible. Une navette à ski vers le téléphérique Schöneben-Haideralm-Kastl, à 7 km, est également disponible. L’hôtel Mein Almhof dispose d’un sèche-chaussures, d’un service de location de skis ainsi que d’une école de ski. Un parking privé gratuit est disponible, tandis que le parking souterrain peut être réservé moyennant un supplément.

In a quiet location in the heart of the Alpbach Valley, the Alpbacherhof offers panoramic views of the surrounding mountains, a 1,600 m² spa area with indoor pool, and a free shuttle bus that goes from 100 metres away to the nearby ski lifts.

Guests of Alpbacherhof - Mountain & Spa Resort can enjoy a wide range of fine dishes and refined wines at the hotel restaurant or end the evening with a cocktail or schnapps at the bar. Half-board includes a welcome drink, buffet breakfast, a lunch/afternoon snack with cake and soup, and 3 dinner options to choose from.

Massages, bike rental and electric bike rental are available for an additional charge. A practice slope for beginners is only a short walk from the hotel. Located in Ramsau am Dachstein, Hotel Annelies features a spa area, an year-round, heated, outdoor infinity pool and free WiFi.

Enjoying a tranquil location in Stubenbach, 2 km from the centre of Lech, the luxury hotel SEVERIN*S – The Alpine Retreat offers 9 suites, a restaurant, a bar and a lounge as well as a spa are.

The elegantly furnished suites of the SEVERIN*S are built out of ancient Tyrol wood from local forests and decorated in contemporary Alpine-style. From the terraces and balconies, guests can enjoy marvelous views of the Lech Mountains and valley.

High quality amenities as well as the exclusive furnishings of the high-end brand Minotti combined with state-of-the-art technology and contemporary art chosen by the experts of Vienna’s Contemporary Art Advisors, create the perfect setting in which to relax and unwind.

The restaurant serves innovative, modern cuisine with regional influences. In the preparation of the dishes, the chef places importance on the use of local organic produce.

The 415 m² large spa area includes a beauty and spa suite with an extensive spa offer, also suitable for couples, a fitness room featuring Techno Gym equipment, a 12.5 metres long indoor pool with counter-current function, waterfall, and hot tub, and 2 saunas, a steam bath as well as an infrared cabin.

The Lech Ski Area is a 5-minute drive away.

Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien is situated in a quiet and unique Biedermeier passageway close to the City Park. Vienna's historic city centre is a 15-minute walk away.

The air-conditioned, Biedermeier-style rooms and suites provide private bathrooms, cable TV and a safe. Some also have a comfortable seating area.

The Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien features a relaxation area with a gym section and a sauna.

Free Wi-Fi is available in the all areas, and there is an indoor car park.

The Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien offers an à la carte restaurant where Austrian and international cuisine is served. Viennese specialities are also available.

The Rochusgasse Underground Station is only 150 metres away from the Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien. The U3 underground line goes directly to the city centre.

Sights like St. Stephen’s Cathedral, the Vienna Opera House and the famous Naschmarkt open-air market can also be easily reached on foot.

The hotel is a 5-minute walk from the CAT train station, which provides transport to the airport within 16 minutes.

Die Unterkunft Das-Schmidt Privathotel, die in Mörbisch am See, 21 km von Schloss Esterházy entfernt gelegen ist, verfügt über Übernachtungsmöglichkeiten mit einem Außenpool, einem kostenlosen Privatparkplatz, einem Fitnesscenter und einem Garten. Die Unterkunft bietet ein Restaurant und hat außerdem eine Terrasse sowie einen Innenpool und eine Sauna. Dieses Hotel bietet ein türkisches Dampfbad, einen Zimmerservice und kostenloses WLAN.

In der Unterkunft Das-Schmidt Privathotel ist jedes Zimmer eingerichtet mit einem Kleiderschrank, einem Flachbild-TV, einem eigenen Badezimmer, Bettwäsche und Handtüchern. Die Unterkunft Das-Schmidt Privathotel bietet ein Spa-Center. Sie können an diesem Hotel mit 4 Sternen Tischtennis spielen. Die Gegend ist beliebt zum Wandern und Fahrradfahren.

Le Burg Vital Resort est un établissement 5 étoiles supérieur situé à quelques minutes à pied de la station de téléphérique Petersbodenbahn du domaine skiable de Lech-Zürs. Il dispose d'un espace spa spacieux avec une piscine intérieure, un sauna, un hammam et une salle de relaxation.

Les chambres spacieuses et modernes sont équipées d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, d'une télévision par câble à écran plat, d'un coin salon, d'un minibar, d'un coffre-fort et d'une salle de bains privative avec douche ou baignoire. Certaines chambres possèdent un balcon.

Les restaurants gastronomiques à la carte sont récompensés par le guide Gault Millau et notre restaurant Girggeler Stuba a reçu 2 étoiles au guide Michelin. Ils servent des plats autrichiens et internationaux avec des produits sélectionnés. La demi-pension comprend un petit-déjeuner buffet varié et le dîner avec un choix de plats principaux.

Vous aurez accès à un jardin avec une terrasse meublée, une piscine extérieure et une aire de jeux pour enfants. Une salle de sport est également disponible. Vous pourrez acheter des produits gastronomiques dans une boutique sur place.

The Hotel Urbisgut offers a friendly, personal atmosphere, cordial hospitality and tradition for an unforgettable and charming holiday.

Enjoy the sunny, quiet location and take a well-deserved break from everyday life. Lush meadows and snowy mountains will quickly let you forget your worries. The rooms boast stylish furniture, light-flooded rooms and a cosy ambiance. Enjoy the comfort of a 4-star hotel and let yourself be surprised by the lovingly prepared small details.

El hotel Urbisgut ofrece un ambiente personal y agradable, una hospitalidad  cordial y una tradición para pasar unas vacaciones inolvidables. 

Podrá disfrutar de su ubicación soleada y tranquila y tomarse un merecido descanso de la rutina diaria. Los frondosos arbustos y las montañas nevadas le harán olvidar sus preocupaciones. Las habitaciones cuentan con muebles modernos, luz natural y un ambiente acogedor. Podrá disfrutar del confort de un hotel de 4 estrellas y sorprenderse con los pequeños detalles.

L'hôtel Urbisgut propose une atmosphère amicale et personnelle, une hospitalité cordiale et une tradition pour des vacances agréables et inoubliables.

Profitez de la situation paisible et ensoleillée et accordez-vous une pause bien méritée dans votre rythme quotidien. Des prairies verdoyantes et des montagnes enneigées vous feront vite oublier vos soucis. Les chambres sont dotées de meubles élégants, et sont très lumineuses, avec une ambiance agréable. Profitez du confort d'un hôtel quatre étoiles et laissez-vous surprendre par toutes sortes de petits détails.

Set in Modriach in Styria, a 30-minute drive from Graz, Gasthof Klug zum Ehrensepp features a children's playground, a sun terrace and a restaurant. Free WiFi and free private parking is available on site.

All rooms have a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with free toiletries and a hair dryer, and some come with a spa bath. Some rooms feature a seating area or views of the mountains or river.

A breakfast buffet is available every morning and the half-board also includes vegetarian dishes.

The Packer Stausee lake is 2 km away and is suitable for fishing and swimming. The Red Bull Ring and Spielberg are 51 km away. Gasthof Klug offers a shuttle service on request.

The Modriach exit of the A2 motorway is 1.5 km away. Thalerhof Airport is 45 km from the property. The centre of Graz and the main train station are a 40-minute drive away.

Das-Schmidt Privathotel se encuentra en Mörbisch am See, a 21 km de Palacio Esterházy, y ofrece alojamiento con piscina al aire libre, parking privado gratis, centro de fitness y jardín. El alojamiento cuenta con restaurante y también tiene terraza, piscina cubierta y sauna. El hotel dispone de hammam, servicio de habitaciones y wifi gratis.

En el hotel, cada habitación tiene armario, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Cada habitación cuenta con caja fuerte, algunas ofrecen balcón y otras también ofrecen vistas a la ciudad. Las habitaciones cuentan con minibar.

En Das-Schmidt Privathotel se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet.

El alojamiento ofrece centro de spa. Se puede jugar al ping-pong en este hotel de 4 estrellas, y la zona es ideal para practicar senderismo y ciclismo.

Castillo de Forchtenstein está a 42 km del alojamiento, y Museo Liszt está a 45 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Viena) está a 46 km, y el alojamiento ofrece servicio de traslado de pago para ir o volver del aeropuerto.

The 5 star superior Burg Vital Resort is situated a few minutes walk from the Petersbodenbahn Cable Car Station of the Lech-Zürs skiing area. It features a spacious spa area with an indoor swimming pool, a sauna, a steam cabin and a relaxation room.

The spacious, modern rooms come with free WiFi, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a seating area, a minibar, a safe, and a private bathroom with shower or bath tub. Some rooms feature a balcony.

The à la carte gourmet restaurants are awarded by Gault Millau and our Restaurant Girggeler Stuba is awarded with 2 Michelin Stars. They serve Austrian and international culinary delights with selected products. Half-board includes a varied breakfast buffet and dinner with a choice of main dishes.

Guests of Burg Vital Resort have access to a garden with a furnished terrace, outdoor pool and a playground for children. A fitness room is also available. Gourmet food products can be bought in a shop on site.

Surrounded by the Nockberge Mountains, this elegant 4-star superior hotel is located right next to the ski slope and hiking trails above Bad Kleinkirchheim and offers bright and modern rooms. Der Kirchheimerhof - Superior Refugium features its own après ski lodge and a 2,000 m² spa area.

The spa area includes a heated outdoor pool with a sunbathing lawn, a heated indoor pool, 9 saunas, a hot tub, a steam bath, an infrared cabin, aromatic showers, a tea and juice bar, and relaxation rooms with water beds and panoramic mountain views. Additionally guests find the Water Spray Land with lots of water attractions included in the spa. There is also a separate Family Spa with water attractions for children and teenagers.

The Kirchheimerhof’s restaurant serves a 5-course dinner which includes Austrian specialities and products from the hotel's own farm. The farm also holds cattle from the Limousin region in France.

For children, the hotel provides an indoor play area on 2 levels, an outdoor adventure playground with a petting zoo, and an outdoor ski fun area with a magic carpet during the winter season. Child care is available on 6 days a week during Austrian school holidays (other periods on request).

From late May to late October, the Kärnten Card can be bought on site.

Circondato dai Monti Nockberge, l’elegante hotel a 4 stelle Der Kirchheimerhof - Superior sorge proprio accanto alla pista da sci e ai sentieri escursionistici sopra Bad Kleinkirchheim e offre camere luminose e moderne. Dispone inoltre di un rifugio après-ski e di un’area benessere di 2.000 m².

L’area benessere include una piscina riscaldata all’aperto con prato prendisole, una piscina coperta riscaldata, diverse saune, una vasca idromassaggio, un bagno di vapore, una cabina a infrarossi, docce aromatiche, un bar dove gusterete tè e succhi, e sale relax munite di lettini ad acqua e viste panoramiche sulle montagne. Inoltre vi attende la Water Spray Land, con diverse attrazioni acquatiche. Nella struttura è presente una spa separata per le famiglie, con tanti divertimenti acquatici per bambini e ragazzi.

Per la cena il ristorante propone un menù di 5 portate con specialità austriache e prodotti provenienti dall’azienda agricola dell’hotel, che vanta anche un allevamento di bovini francesi originari della regione di Limousin.

I bambini potranno divertirsi nell’area giochi coperta su 2 livelli, nel parco avventura esterno con fattoria didattica e nell’area sci all’aperto con tapis roulant durante la stagione invernale. Inoltre è presente un servizio baby-sitting, fruibile 6 giorni a settimana durante le vacanze scolastiche austriache (negli altri periodi è disponibile su richiesta).

Da fine maggio a fine ottobre avrete modo di acquistare in loco la Kärnten Card.

Just steps away from the Gastein Golf Course, this 4-star superior hotel enjoys a quiet location in the Gastein Valley. Surrounded by the Hohe Tauern Mountains, it offers a spa area, gourmet cuisine, and free WiFi.

The 1,800 m² spa area includes an indoor pool with thermal water, a sauna area, an infrared cabin, relaxation areas, various baths, fitness and aerobucs rooms, and beauty treatment rooms. The outdoor area includes a large sunbathing lawn and tennis courts.

The spacious and elegant rooms at the EUROPÄISCHER HOF Bad Gastein include a flat-screen cable TV, a minibar (stocked on request), and a seating area. The bathrooms feature bathrobes and a hairdryer.

The restaurant serve Austrian and international cuisine. Half-board with a 4-course dinner with salad buffet or a buffet evening is available on request. Also on site is a typical Austrian café serving homemade pastries. Services begin with dinner on the day of arrival and end with breakfast on the day of departure. Additional services (breakfast on the day of arrival, afternoon snack, etc.) can be used at an additional cost.

Various activities such as tennis, hiking and mountain biking are organised. A cross-country ski run is right outside. Free public parking is available on site.

Il Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien sorge in un tranquillo e caratteristico vicolo in puro stile Biedermeier, in prossimità del parco cittadino e a 15 minuti a piedi dal centro storico di Vienna.

Le camere e le suite, anch'esse in stile Biedermeier, sono dotate di aria condizionata, bagno privato, TV via cavo e cassaforte. Alcune vantano un'accogliente area salotto.

Il Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien sfoggia inoltre un'area relax con sauna e zona palestra.

La connessione Wi-Fi è disponibile in tutte le aree. In loco è presente un parcheggio coperto.

Il ristorante alla carta serve cucina austriaca e internazionale, oltre a squisite specialità viennesi.

La Stazione della Metropolitana Rochusgasse (linea 3) dista solo 150 metri dall'albergo ed è collegata direttamente con il centro della città.

Con una piacevole passeggiata potrete raggiungere attrazioni turistiche come la Cattedrale di Santo Stefano, il Teatro Lirico di Vienna e il Naschmarkt, il famoso mercatino delle pulci all'aperto.

Il Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien si trova a 5 minuti a piedi dalla stazione dei treni CAT, che vi permetteranno di raggiungere l'aeroporto in circa 16 minuti.

Situato a Mörbisch am See, a 21 km da Palazzo Esterházy, Das-Schmidt Privathotel prevede una piscina all'aperto, un parcheggio privato gratuito, un centro fitness e un giardino. Provvisto di un ristorante, l’alloggio dispone anche di una terrazza, oltre a una piscina coperta e una sauna. L'hotel presenta un bagno turco, il servizo in camera e il WiFi gratuito.

Presso questo hotel, ogni camera include un armadio, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Le camere comprendono una cassaforte, mentre alcune camere sono provviste di un balcone e altre offrono anche una vista sulla città. Le camere presentano un minibar.

Presso Das-Schmidt Privathotel potrete gustare una colazione a buffet.

El Hotel Grauer Bär cuenta con aparcamiento gratuito y goza de una ubicación tranquila a pocos minutos a pie del centro de Sölden, a tan sólo 100 metros del teleférico Gaislachkogelbahn.

Todas las habitaciones disponen de baño privado, TV por cable y escritorio y algunas también tienen balcón con vistas impresionantes a la montaña.

Además hay sauna, baño de vapor y solárium para relajarse y podrá practicar ciclismo de montaña y senderismo en los cercanos Alpes de Ötztal y de Stubai.

El restaurante del Grauer Bär sirve especialidades tirolesas e internacionales. También hay un bar de cócteles.

Enjoying a tranquil location in Stubenbach, 2 km from the centre of Lech, the luxury hotel SEVERIN*S – The Alpine Retreat offers 9 suites, a restaurant, a bar and a lounge as well as a spa are.

The elegantly furnished suites of the SEVERIN*S are built out of ancient Tyrol wood from local forests and decorated in contemporary Alpine-style. From the terraces and balconies, guests can enjoy marvelous views of the Lech Mountains and valley.

High quality amenities as well as the exclusive furnishings of the high-end brand Minotti combined with state-of-the-art technology and contemporary art chosen by the experts of Vienna’s Contemporary Art Advisors, create the perfect setting in which to relax and unwind.

The restaurant serves innovative, modern cuisine with regional influences. In the preparation of the dishes, the chef places importance on the use of local organic produce.

The 415 m² large spa area includes a beauty and spa suite with an extensive spa offer, also suitable for couples, a fitness room featuring Techno Gym equipment, a 12.5 metres long indoor pool with counter-current function, waterfall, and hot tub, and 2 saunas, a steam bath as well as an infrared cabin.

The Lech Ski Area is a 5-minute drive away.

Le Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien bénéficie d'un emplacement exceptionnel et paisible dans une ruelle datant de la période Biedermeier, à proximité du parc de la ville. Il vous accueille à 15 minutes à pied du centre-ville historique de Vienne.

Présentant une décoration inspirée de la période Biedermeier, les chambres et les suites sont climatisées. Elles possèdent une salle de bains privative, une télévision par câble et un coffre-fort. Certaines d'entre elles comprennent en outre un coin salon confortable.

Vous profiterez également d'un espace de détente doté d'une salle de sport et d'un sauna.

Une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l'ensemble de l'établissement et un parking couvert sont mis à votre disposition.

Sur place, le restaurant à la carte sert des plats autrichiens et internationaux. De plus, des spécialités viennoises y sont préparées.

La station de métro Rochusgasse vous attend à seulement 150 mètres. La ligne U3 vous permettra de rejoindre directement le centre-ville.

Par ailleurs, la cathédrale Saint-Étienne, l'opéra d'État de Vienne et le célèbre marché en plein air Naschmarkt sont accessibles à quelques pas.

Enfin, vous séjournerez à 5 minutes de marche de la gare Wien-Mitte, où des trains CAT desservent l'aéroport en 16 minutes.

El Burg Vital Resort, de 5 estrellas superior, está situado a pocos minutos a pie de la estación del teleférico Petersbodenbahn de la estación de esquí de Lech-Zürs. Cuenta con una amplia zona de spa con piscina cubierta, sauna, cabina de vapor y sala de relajación.

Las habitaciones son amplias y modernas y cuentan con WiFi gratuita, TV de pantalla plana por cable, zona de estar, minibar, caja fuerte y baño privado con ducha o bañera. Algunas habitaciones tienen balcón.

Los restaurantes gourmet a la carta son galardonados por Gault Millau y nuestro restaurante Girggeler Stuba es galardonado con 2 estrellas Michelin. Sirven delicias culinarias austriacas e internacionales con productos seleccionados. El régimen de media pensión incluye un variado desayuno bufé y una cena con una selección de platos principales.

Los huéspedes del Burg Vital Resort tienen acceso a un jardín con terraza amueblada, piscina al aire libre y parque infantil. También hay una sala de fitness. El establecimiento alberga una tienda que vende productos gourmet.

L’établissement Das-Schmidt Privathotel se trouve à Mörbisch am See, à 21 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Palais Esterházy. Il propose une piscine extérieure, une salle de sport, un jardin et un parking privé gratuit. Il comprend un restaurant, une terrasse, une piscine intérieure et un sauna. Cet hôtel comprend un hammam, un service d'étage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

Tous les hébergements comprennent une armoire, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous bénéficierez d'un coffre-fort. Certains hébergements comprennent également un balcon et d'autres offrent une vue sur la ville. Vous profiterez aussi d’un minibar.

Un petit-déjeuner buffet est servi sur place.

L’établissement Das-Schmidt Privathotel dispose d’un spa. Vous pourrez jouer au ping-pong dans cet hôtel 4 étoiles, et la région est prisée des amateurs de randonnée et de vélo.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 42 km et 45 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Château de Forchtenstein et Musée Liszt. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Vienne-Schwechat) est à 46 km. Un service de navette aéroport payant peut être assuré par l’établissement.

Dieses elegante 4-Sterne-Superior-Hotel mit hellen, modernen Zimmern ist von den Nockbergen umgeben und liegt direkt an der Skipiste und den Wanderwegen oberhalb von Bad Kleinkirchheim. Der Kirchheimerhof - Superior Refugium verfügt über eine eigene Après-Ski-Hütte und einen 2.000 m² großen Wellnessbereich.

Zum Wellnessbereich gehören ein beheizter Außenpool mit einer Liegewiese, einen beheizten Innenpool, 9 Saunen, einen Whirlpool, ein Dampfbad, eine Infrarotkabine, Aromaduschen, eine Tee- und Saftbar sowie Ruheräume mit Wasserbetten und Panoramablick auf die Berge. Im Spa erwartet Sie außerdem das Water Spray Land mit vielen Wasserattraktionen. Auch ein separates Familien-Spa mit Wasserattraktionen für Kinder und Jugendliche ist vorhanden.

Das Restaurant im Kirchheimerhof serviert ein 5-Gänge-Abendessen mit österreichischen Spezialitäten und Produkten vom hoteleigenen Bauernhof. Auf dem Bauernhof werden Rinder aus der französischen Region Limousin gehalten.

Für Kinder bietet das Hotel einen Innenspielbereich auf 2 Ebenen und einen Abenteuerspielplatz mit einem Streichelzoo im Freien. In der Wintersaison können sich die jüngstem Gäste zudem auf Skispaß mit einem Zauberteppich im Außenbereich freuen. Eine Kinderbetreuung ist während der österreichischen Schulferien (andere Zeiten auf Anfrage) an 6 Tagen in der Woche möglich.

Von Ende Mai bis Ende Oktober können Sie in der Unterkunft die Kärnten Card kaufen.

O Hotel Urbisgut proporciona uma atmosfera amigável e pessoal, bem como hospitalidade e tradição para umas férias inesquecíveis e encantadoras.

Desfrute da localização ensolarada e tranquila e faça uma pausa bem merecida da vida quotidiana. Os prados exuberantes e as montanhas de neve permitem-lhe esquecer as suas preocupações. Os quartos apresentam mobiliário elegante, quartos repletos de luz e um ambiente acolhedor. Desfrute do conforto de um hotel de 4 estrelas e deixe-se surpreender pelos pequenos detalhes cuidadosamente preparados.

O Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien está situado numa passagem exclusiva e tranquila de estilo Biedermeier, perto do Parque da Cidade. O centro histórico da cidade de Viena encontra-se a uma caminhada de 15 minutos.

Todos os quartos e suites de estilo Biedermeier incluem ar condicionado, casas de banho privativas, televisão por cabo e um cofre. Algumas acomodações possuem uma área de estar confortável.

O Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien tem uma área de relaxamento com uma secção de ginásio e uma sauna.

O acesso Wi-Fi está disponível nos todas as áreas, e há um parque de estacionamento interior.

O Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien proporciona um restaurante à carta, onde é servida cozinha austríaca e internacional. Também estão disponíveis especialidades vienenses.

A Estação de Metro Rochusgasse está apenas a 150 metros do Mercure Grand Hotel Biedermeier Wien. A linha de metro U3 providencia ligações directas para o centro da cidade.

Os locais turísticos como a Catedral de Santo Estêvão, a Ópera de Viena e o famoso mercado ao ar livre, Naschmarkt, também podem ser facilmente alcançados a pé.

O hotel fica a uma caminhada de 5 minutos da Estação Ferroviária CAT, que fornece transporte para o aeroporto em cerca de 16 minutos.

The 5 star superior Burg Vital Resort is situated a few minutes walk from the Petersbodenbahn Cable Car Station of the Lech-Zürs skiing area. It features a spacious spa area with an indoor swimming pool, a sauna, a steam cabin and a relaxation room.

The spacious, modern rooms come with free WiFi, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a seating area, a minibar, a safe, and a private bathroom with shower or bath tub. Some rooms feature a balcony.

The à la carte gourmet restaurants are awarded by Gault Millau and our Restaurant Girggeler Stuba is awarded with 2 Michelin Stars. They serve Austrian and international culinary delights with selected products. Half-board includes a varied breakfast buffet and dinner with a choice of main dishes.

Guests of Burg Vital Resort have access to a garden with a furnished terrace, outdoor pool and a playground for children. A fitness room is also available. Gourmet food products can be bought in a shop on site.

Das 5-Sterne-Superior-Burg Vital Resort liegt nur wenige Gehminuten von der Seilbahnstation Petersbodenbahn im Skigebiet Lech-Zürs entfernt. Freuen Sie sich auf einen großzügigen Wellnessbereich mit Innenpool, Sauna, Dampfbad und Ruheraum.

Die geräumigen, modernen Zimmer verfügen über kostenfreies WLAN, einen Flachbild-Kabel-TV, einen Sitzbereich, eine Minibar, einen Safe und ein eigenes Bad mit einer Dusche oder einer Badewanne. Einige Zimmer bieten einen Balkon.

Die À-la-carte-Gourmetrestaurants werden von Gault Millau ausgezeichnet und unser Restaurant Girggeler Stuba ist mit 2 Michelin-Sternen ausgezeichnet. Sie servieren österreichische und internationale Köstlichkeiten mit ausgewählten Produkten. Die Halbpension beinhaltet ein abwechslungsreiches Frühstücksbuffet und Abendessen mit einer Auswahl an Hauptgerichten.

Im Burg Vital Resort haben Sie Zugang zu einem Garten mit einer möblierten Terrasse, einem Außenpool und einem Kinderspielplatz. Ein Fitnessraum ist ebenfalls vorhanden. Gourmet-Lebensmittel können Sie in einem Geschäft in der Unterkunft kaufen.

Das-Schmidt Privathotel localiza-se em Mörbisch am See, a 21 km de Palácio Eszterháza, e fornece acomodações com uma piscina exterior, estacionamento privado gratuito, um centro de fitness e um jardim. Fornecendo um restaurante, o alojamento também dispõe de um terraço, assim como piscina interior e sauna. Este hotel apresenta hammam, serviço de quartos e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.

No alojamento, cada quarto inclui roupeiro, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Os quartos incluem um cofre, enquanto alguns quartos estão equipados com varanda e outros também disponibilizam vistas da cidade. As acomodações providenciam um minibar.

Das-Schmidt Privathotel disponibiliza pequeno-almoço buffet aos seus hóspedes.

Das-Schmidt Privathotel possui um centro de spa. Pode jogar ténis de mesa neste hotel de 4 estrelas, e a área é popular para caminhadas e ciclismo.

Castelo de Forchtenstein fica a 42 km de Das-Schmidt Privathotel, enquanto Museu Liszt fica a 45 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto Internacional de Viena fica a 46 km de distância, e o alojamento oferece um serviço de transfer do aeroporto por um custo adicional.

The 5 star superior Burg Vital Resort is situated a few minutes walk from the Petersbodenbahn Cable Car Station of the Lech-Zürs skiing area. It features a spacious spa area with an indoor swimming pool, a sauna, a steam cabin and a relaxation room.

The spacious, modern rooms come with free WiFi, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a seating area, a minibar, a safe, and a private bathroom with shower or bath tub. Some rooms feature a balcony.

The à la carte gourmet restaurants are awarded by Gault Millau and our Restaurant Girggeler Stuba is awarded with 2 Michelin Stars. Guests of Burg Vital Resort have access to a garden with a furnished terrace, outdoor pool and a playground for children. A fitness room is also available. Gourmet food products can be bought in a shop on site.

Surrounded by the Nockberge Mountains, this elegant 4-star superior hotel is located right next to the ski slope and hiking trails above Bad Kleinkirchheim and offers bright and modern rooms. Der Kirchheimerhof - Superior Refugium features its own après ski lodge and a 2,000 m² spa area.

The spa area includes a heated outdoor pool with a sunbathing lawn, a heated indoor pool, 9 saunas, a hot tub, a steam bath, an infrared cabin, aromatic showers, a tea and juice bar, and relaxation rooms with water beds and panoramic mountain views. Additionally guests find the Water Spray Land with lots of water attractions included in the spa. There is also a separate Family Spa with water attractions for children and teenagers.

The Kirchheimerhof’s restaurant serves a 5-course dinner which includes Austrian specialities and products from the hotel's own farm. The farm also holds cattle from the Limousin region in France.

For children, the hotel provides an indoor play area on 2 levels, an outdoor adventure playground with a petting zoo, and an outdoor ski fun area with a magic carpet during the winter season. Child care is available on 6 days a week during Austrian school holidays (other periods on request).

From late May to late October, the Kärnten Card can be bought on site.

Das Hotel Urbisgut bietet eine persönliche, familiäre Atmosphäre, herzliche Gastfreundschaft und Tradition für einen unvergesslichen Urlaub mit Herz und Charme.

Genießen Sie die sonnige, ruhige Lage und nehmen Sie sich eine wohlverdiente Auszeit vom Alltag. Saftige Wiesen und verschneite Berge lassen Sie Ihre Sorgen schnell vergessen. Die Zimmer bestechen durch stilvolle Möbel, lichtdurchflutete Räume und ein gemütliches Ambiente. Genießen Sie den Komfort eines 4-Sterne-Hauses und lassen Sie sich von den liebevollen kleinen Details angenehm überraschen.

Dieses 4-Sterne-Superior-Hotel begrüßt Sie in ruhiger Lage im Gasteinertal, nur wenige Schritte vom Golfplatz Gastein entfernt. inmitten der Hohen Tauern. Freuen Sie sich auf einen Wellnessbereich, Gourmetküche und kostenloses WLAN.

Der 1.800 m² große Wellnessbereich umfasst einen Innenpool mit Thermalwasser, einen Saunabereich, eine Infrarotkabine, Ruhezonen, verschiedene Bäder sowie Fitness- und Aerobic-Räume sowie Räume für Schönheitsanwendungen. Im Außenbereich erwarten Sie eine große Liegewiese zum Sonnenbaden und Tennisplätze.

Die geräumigen und eleganten Zimmer im EUROPÄISCHER HOF Bad Gastein verfügen über einen Flachbild-Kabel-TV, eine Minibar (auf Anfrage befüllt) und eine Sitzecke. Im Badezimmer liegen Bademäntel und ein Haartrockner für Sie bereit.

Das Restaurant serviert österreichische und internationale Küche. Halbpension mit einem 4-Gänge-Abendessen mit Salatbuffet oder ein Abendbuffet werden auf Anfrage angeboten. In der Unterkunft erwartet Sie zudem ein typisch österreichisches Café mit hausgemachtem Gebäck. Die Verpflegung beginnt mit dem Abendessen am Anreisetag und endet mit dem Frühstück am Abreisetag. Zusätzliche Leistungen (Frühstück am Anreisetag, Snack am Nachmittag usw.) sind gegen Aufpreis verfügbar.

Die Mitarbeiter organisieren gern verschiedene Aktivitäten wie Tennis, Wandern und Mountainbiken für Sie. Eine Langlaufloipe verläuft direkt vor der Haustür. An der Unterkunft befinden sich kostenlose öffentliche Parkplätze.

Ubicato in posizione idilliaca a Erpfendorf, tra le montagne di Kitzbühel, a soli 16 km da Kitzbühel, il lussuoso hotel a 5 stelle Der Lärchenhof ospita un ristorante gourmet, una piscina coperta e una all'aperto, un'area benessere ampia 4700 m² e un moderno centro fitness di 300 m², e vanta un impianto di risalita e una scuola di sci privati.

La struttura offre trattamenti di bellezza e per il corpo con prodotti esclusivi St. Barth, Maria Galland, Environ e Alpienne, e propone check per la vitalità e la salute e programmi fitness con aqua-fit, pilates, Qi Gong, e nordic walking. Costruita di recente, la sauna è dotata di una scala mobile che vi condurrà al suo giardino panoramico, ideale per ammirare una maestosa vista sulle montagne circostanti.

Al mattino vi attende una ricca colazione a buffet con angolo biologico, mentre in serata vengono serviti una varietà di deliziosi piatti, specialità austriache, un buffet di dessert e uno di insalate.

La struttura dista solo 5 km dal comprensorio sciistico Steinplatte, dove troverete posti auto riservati, ed è lieta di organizzare escursioni in bicicletta, in mountain bike e con racchette da neve, e attività di trekking invernale. Le proposte per il tempo libero includono gite romantiche in carrozza trainata da cavalli, serate con slittino, curling, sci di fondo con guida, biathlon e molto altro.

È disponibile un servizio di babysitter per bambini a partire da 3 anni di età.

Il Lärchenhof ospita una scuola di tennis con 5 campi in terra e 3 campi coperti, un campo da golf a 9 buche e una scuola di golf con campo a 6 buche, e sorge proprio accanto al maneggio Hanneshof e in corrispondenza di vari percorsi da biathlon.

La città di Salisburgo dista 50 km.

Situated in Grossarl, 41 km from Eisriesenwelt Werfen, Familien Natur Resort Moar Gut features accommodation with a shared lounge, free private parking, a restaurant and a bar. Among the facilities at this property are a kids' club and room service, along with free WiFi throughout the property. An outdoor swimming pool, meeting and banquet facilities, garden, terrace, indoor pool, sauna and water park are at our guests' disposal.

At the hotel the rooms have a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Familien Natur Resort Moar Gut offers some rooms that have a patio, and all rooms are equipped with a coffee machine. All rooms will provide guests with a wardrobe and a kettle.

The breakfast offers buffet, continental or American options.

The spa and wellness centre at the accommodation features a hot tub and a hammam. You can play billiards, table tennis and darts at this 5-star hotel, and the area is popular for hiking and skiing.

Speaking German and English, staff are ready to help around the clock at the reception.

Bischofshofen Train Station is 28 km from Familien Natur Resort Moar Gut, while Paul-Ausserleitner-Schanze is 29 km from the property. Salzburg W. A. Mozart Airport is 80 km away.

Inmitten der Kitzbüheler Bergwelt begrüßt Sie Der Lärchenhof, ein luxuriöses 5-Sterne-Hotel in idyllischer Lage in Erpfendorf, nur 16 km von Kitzbühel entfernt. Freuen Sie sich auf ein Gourmetrestaurant, einen Innen- sowie Außenpool und einen 4.700 m² großen Wellnessbereich. Es gibt auch ein modernes 300 m² großes Fitnesscenter. Zudem bietet das Hotel einen eigenen Skilift und eine Skischule.

Entspannen Sie bei Schönheits- und Körperanwendungen mit exklusiven Produkten von St. Barth, Maria Galland, Environ und Alpienne. Vitalitäts- und Gesundheitskontrollen stehen ebenfalls zur Verfügung und das Fitnessangebot umfasst Aqua-Fit, Pilates, Qi Gong und Nordic Walking. Die neu gebaute Sauna verfügt über eine Rolltreppe, die Sie zum Panorama-Saunagarten mit einer beeindruckenden Aussicht auf die umliegenden Berge bringt.

Das reichhaltige Frühstücksbuffet umfasst auch eine Bio-Ecke. Abends werden eine vielfältige Auswahl an köstlichen Speisen und österreichischen Spezialitäten sowie ein Dessert- und Salatbuffet angeboten.

Reservierte Parkplätze finden Sie nur 5 km entfernt im Skigebiet Steinplatte. Rad- und Mountainbiketouren sowie Schneeschuhwandern und Winterwanderungen werden angeboten. Mögliche Freizeitaktivitäten sind Fahrten mit einer romantischen Pferdekutsche, Rodelabende, Eisstockschießen, geführte Langlauftouren, Biathlon und vieles mehr.

Eine Kinderbetreuung steht für Kinder ab 3 Jahren zur Verfügung.

Tennisspieler freuen sich im Lärchenhof auf eine Tennisakademie mit 5 Sandplätzen und 3 Hallenplätzen. Auf Golfspieler warten ein 9-Loch-Golfplatz und eine 6-Loch-Akademie. Der Reitstall Hanneshof befindet sich gleich nebenan. Biathlon-Strecken stehen ebenfalls zur Verfügung.

Von Salzburg trennen Sie 50 km.

Set in Mayrhofen, 1.5 km from Congress Zillertal - Europahaus Mayrhofen, ZillergrundRock Luxury Mountain Resort offers accommodation with a restaurant, free private parking, an outdoor swimming pool and a fitness centre. Among the various facilities are a bar, a shared lounge, as well as a garden. The accommodation provides an indoor pool, free WiFi throughout the property and family rooms.

The units at the hotel come with a flat-screen TV and a safety deposit box. At ZillergrundRock Luxury Mountain every room includes a private bathroom with bathrobes and slippers.

Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a continental breakfast.

ZillergrundRock Luxury Mountain Resort offers 4-star accommodation with a spa centre and children's playground. Guests at the hotel will be able to enjoy activities in and around Mayrhofen, like skiing and cycling.

Mayrhofen is 1.6 km from ZillergrundRock Luxury Mountain, while Vans Penken Park is 6 km away. The nearest airport is Innsbruck Airport, 41 km from the accommodation.

Familien Natur Resort Moar Gut está en Grossarl, a 41 km de Eisriesenwelt Werfen, y dispone de alojamiento con salón de uso común, parking privado gratis, restaurante y bar. Set amidst the Kitzbühel mountains, the Der Lärchenhof is a luxurious 5-star hotel in an idyllic location in Erpfendorf, only 16 km away from Kitzbühel. It includes a gourmet restaurant, an indoor pool, an outdoor pool, and a 4.700 m² spa area. There is also a modern 300 m² fitness centre and the hotel features its own ski lift and ski school.

Beauty and body treatments with exclusive products by St. Barth, Maria Galland, Environ and Alpienne are available. Vitality and health checks are also offered and the fitness offer includes Aqua-fit, Pilates, Qi Gong, and Nordic Walking. The newly-built sauna features an escalator, lifting guests to the panorama sauna garden with impressive views of the surrounding mountains.

The rich breakfast buffet features an organic corner. In the evening you can enjoy a varied selection of delicious dishes, as well as Austrian specialities, a dessert buffet, and a salad buffet.

Guests will find reserved parking spaces at the Steinplatte Ski Area, only 5 km away. Bike and mountain-bike tours as well as snowshoe hiking and winter hiking tours are offered. Available leisure options include romantic horse-drawn carriage rides, toboggan evenings, curling, guided cross-country ski tours, biathlon and much more.

Child care is offered for children from 3 years.

For tennis players, the Lärchenhof features a tennis academy with 5 clay courts and 3 indoor courts. For golf players, there is a 9-hole course and a 6-hole academy, while for equestrians, the Hanneshof riding stables are just next door. Biathlon tracks are featured on site.

The city of Salzburg is 50 km away.

Hotel Restaurant Raunig – Hospitality, nature and comfort in Bad Kleinkirchheim

Welcome to Hotel Restaurant Raunig, your ideal base in Bad Kleinkirchheim, in the heart of the beautiful Nockberge National Park. Our hotel is located on a quiet, sunny mountainside and offers breathtaking panoramic views of the valley. On our sunny terrace, you can relax in peace and quiet, the perfect place for a cup of coffee, a refreshing drink or a moment of relaxation in the mountain air.

Our rooms are stylishly and comfortably furnished and all have a private balcony with a view of the Kaiserburg. In winter, you can look out over the snow-covered slopes of Bad Kleinkirchheim, which together offer 103 kilometres of downhill runs.

In the restaurant, we spoil you with international dishes and seasonal specialities. You can choose a refined 3-course menu or enjoy our Sharing Dining concept, where tasting and sharing experiences are central. For our half-board guests, we offer a 3-course menu, with the option of upgrading to our delicious Sharing Dining dinner.

After a day of hiking, cycling, golfing or skiing, you can completely relax in our sauna or infrared cabin, which are free for all our guests, followed by drinks in the restaurant or our cosy hotel lobby.

Indoor relaxation has also been taken care of: curl up on the sofa with a series for a Netflix moment, play a game of table tennis, or let off steam with a game on the Wii.
From April to the end of October, our guests benefit from both the Kärnten Card and the Sonneshein Card, which give you free admission or attractive discounts at numerous attractions in the region. The Sonneshein Card is available all year round.

Practical convenience is also part of the package: we offer free parking on site, there is a lift, a heated storage room for skis and ski boots, and you can use Wi-Fi free of charge.
Bad Kleinkirchheim is also known for its two beautiful thermal baths: the Römerbad and Thermen St. Kathrein, both ideal for those looking for extra wellness and relaxation. The Römerbad is also located almost directly below us.

At Hotel Restaurant Raunig, you will experience the perfect combination of nature, comfort and warm Austrian hospitality. We look forward to welcoming you.

Please note! In winter, it is compulsory in Austria to drive with winter tyres and to carry snow chains.

Hotel Restaurant Raunig – Hospitality, nature and comfort in Bad Kleinkirchheim

Welcome to Hotel Restaurant Raunig, your ideal base in Bad Kleinkirchheim, in the heart of the beautiful Nockberge National Park. Our hotel is located on a quiet, sunny mountainside and offers breathtaking panoramic views of the valley. On our sunny terrace, you can relax in peace and quiet, the perfect place for a cup of coffee, a refreshing drink or a moment of relaxation in the mountain air.

Our rooms are stylishly and comfortably furnished and all have a private balcony with a view of the Kaiserburg. In winter, you can look out over the snow-covered slopes of Bad Kleinkirchheim, which together offer 103 kilometres of downhill runs.

In the restaurant, we spoil you with international dishes and seasonal specialities. You can choose a refined 3-course menu or enjoy our Sharing Dining concept, where tasting and sharing experiences are central. For our half-board guests, we offer a 3-course menu, with the option of upgrading to our delicious Sharing Dining dinner.

After a day of hiking, cycling, golfing or skiing, you can completely relax in our sauna or infrared cabin, which are free for all our guests, followed by drinks in the restaurant or our cosy hotel lobby.

Indoor relaxation has also been taken care of: curl up on the sofa with a series for a Netflix moment, play a game of table tennis, or let off steam with a game on the Wii.
From April to the end of October, our guests benefit from both the Kärnten Card and the Sonneshein Card, which give you free admission or attractive discounts at numerous attractions in the region. The Sonneshein Card is available all year round.

Practical convenience is also part of the package: we offer free parking on site, there is a lift, a heated storage room for skis and ski boots, and you can use Wi-Fi free of charge.
Bad Kleinkirchheim is also known for its two beautiful thermal baths: the Römerbad and Thermen St. Kathrein, both ideal for those looking for extra wellness and relaxation. The Römerbad is also located almost directly below us.

At Hotel Restaurant Raunig, you will experience the perfect combination of nature, comfort and warm Austrian hospitality. We look forward to welcoming you.

Please note! In winter, it is compulsory in Austria to drive with winter tyres and to carry snow chains.
